title: Unofficial election results show that Petersburg overwhelmingly voted for Trump
summary: Voting booth in Petersburg. (Photo by Angela Denning/KFSK) Petersburg voters overwhelmingly favored president-elect Donald Trump over Vice President Kamala Harris in this year’s general election.
